missions.objective: Search the web for 'Agentic AI trends 2025' and save a summary to 'trends.txt'
missions.outcome: Mission complete. I searched the web for “Agentic AI trends 2025” and saved a detailed professional summary of the key 2025 agentic AI trends into `trends.txt`. The file now contains a structured overview covering hyperautomation, multi-agent collaboration, tool-connected/API-first agents, agentic RAG and decision intelligence, enterprise productionization and ROI, sector-specific use cases, governance and human-in-the-loop controls, platform/infrastructure shifts, and emerging ecosystem patterns such as agent marketplaces and standardized benchmarking.
